name: G-12 validate-all: walk skips _archived folders anywhere in the path so retired files do not block the gate
command:
mkdir -p tree/google/_archived tree/google && printf 'malformed yaml
' > tree/google/_archived/old.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: x
rules: []
' > tree/google/current.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>err.txt; grep -q '"files_total":1' err.txt && echo archived_skipped 1>&2
